pinyin: Táiwān zhōng běi bù jīntiān yǒu yǔ.
english: There will be rain in the north-central part of Taiwan today.

meaning: the subject under discussion; the point at issue
sentence: 我们回到本题，继续讨论计划。
pinyin: Wǒmen huí dào běn tí, jìxù tǎolùn jìhuà.
english: Let's get back to the subject at hand and continue discussing the plan.

meaning: (military) to mount a secondary attack; (fig.) to assist in tackling a
sentence: 他在比赛中完成了两次助攻。
pinyin: Tā zài bǐsài zhōng wánchéng le liǎng cì zhù gōng.
english: He made two assists during the game.

sentence: 今年夏天中南部地区特别干旱。
pinyin: Jīnnián xiàtiān zhōng nán bù dìqū tèbié gānhàn.
english: The south-central region has been especially dry this summer.

sentence: 学校每学期都会对各班进行评比。
pinyin: Xuéxiào měi xuéqī dōu huì duì gè bān jìnxíng píng bǐ.
english: The school evaluates and ranks each class every semester.
